summary: ISS-1578 (citation fix in §4.2.7) — the row-number fragility ('rows 23 and 28 of the 28-domain dashboard') was correctly stripped during EXP-254 integration, but the integrated text retained an inaccurate file attribution (cites formula_runtime.json for solar-diameter / lunar-diameter domains). Live-fetch verification on 2026-04-27 confirms: (a) formula_runtime.json (V51.1) contains six formula records and does NOT enumerate solar-diameter or lunar-diameter as scored domains; (b) status_history.json's most-recent entry contains 39 scored domains including 'Solar Angular Diameter' (row 29) and 'Moon Angular Diameter Variation' (row 36). EXP-268 supplies a verified-unique substring patch that replaces the formula_runtime.json citation with a status_history.json citation naming the domains as the dome itself names them. After the decider integrates EXP-268, ISS-1578 can close. Side note: the dashboard expansion 28→39 also makes §4.1's '28-Domain / 47.69σ' framing stale — this is flagged in EXP-268's other_defects_noted as a separate scope, recommended as a fresh ISS for the decider to track.
